const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, status: 'blocked', reason: 'Deployment preparation failed', blocked_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'rejected', process_id: input.process_id, story_id: input.story_id, release_decision: input.release_decision, rejected_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
